event_comments:
Several items were left/found at the end of the meet (glasses, a bag with jacket and other contents, a water bottle) – these will be at the info tent at the next meet at South Seattle College! For lost and found you may also contact info@cascadeoc.org with any questions; we do still have some items from previous events.
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
